# Lua 5.4.7 FS-UAE test suite
# Category 2 (scripting interpreter) — minimum 10 tests required
# Generated by test-designer agent, 2026-03-21
#
# FUNCTIONAL TESTS: -v, -e, -E, -W, -l, --, script execution
# ERROR PATH TESTS: bad flag, missing -e arg, nonexistent file, syntax error, runtime error
# EXIT CODE TESTS: RC=0 (success), RC=10 (error)
# EDGE CASE TESTS: empty script, 32-bit integer boundary, recursion, coroutines
# AMIGA-SPECIFIC: T: tmpname, WORK: script path, 32-bit math.maxinteger

TEST: -v prints version string
CMD: WORK:lua -v
EXPECT: Lua 5.4.7  Copyright (C) 1994-2024 Lua.org, PUC-Rio
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -e executes a print expression
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(2+3)"
EXPECT: 5
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -e string concatenation
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print('amiga' .. '68k')"
EXPECT: amiga68k
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -e with math library call
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(math.sqrt(144))"
EXPECT: 12.0
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -E ignores environment variables (runs cleanly with no LUA_INIT)
CMD: WORK:lua -E -e "print('env ignored')"
EXPECT: env ignored
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -W enables warnings (does not crash, exits 0)
CMD: WORK:lua -W -e "print('warnings on')"
EXPECT: warnings on
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -- stops option processing (passes remaining args to script)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print('pre dash dash')" -- -notanoption
EXPECT: pre dash dash
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: execute a script file via WORK: volume path
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-hello.lua
EXPECT: hello from script
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: script with table operations
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-table.lua
EXPECT: 5
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: file I/O roundtrip using T: volume
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-fileio.lua
EXPECT: amiga file io works
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: coroutine yield and resume
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-coroutine.lua
EXPECT: 15
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: string library operations
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-string-ops.lua
EXPECT: 13
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: integer floor division (Lua 5.4 feature)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(7 // 2)"
EXPECT: 3
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: bitwise AND operator (Lua 5.4 feature)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(0xFF & 0x0F)"
EXPECT: 15
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: for loop accumulator
CMD: WORK:lua -e "local s=0 for i=1,100 do s=s+i end print(s)"
EXPECT: 5050
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: fibonacci recursion returns correct result
CMD: WORK:lua -e "function fib(n) if n<2 then return n end return fib(n-1)+fib(n-2) end print(fib(20))"
EXPECT: 6765
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: math.maxinteger is 32-bit on Amiga (2^31 - 1)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(math.maxinteger)"
EXPECT: 2147483647
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: os.tmpname returns a T: volume path (Amiga-specific shim)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(os.tmpname():sub(1,2))"
EXPECT: T:
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: type() returns correct type names
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(type(42), type('x'), type(true), type(nil))"
EXPECT: number	string	boolean	nil
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: empty script file exits cleanly with RC 0 (edge case)
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-empty.lua
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: unrecognized option returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua -Z
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: -e with missing argument returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua -e
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: nonexistent script file returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:no-such-script.lua
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: syntax error in -e argument returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua -e "print(unclosed"
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: syntax error in script file returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-syntax-error.lua
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: runtime error in script returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-runtime-error.lua
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: runtime error message contains script name (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua WORK:test-lua-runtime-error.lua
EXPECT_CONTAINS: test-lua-runtime-error.lua
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: -l with nonexistent module returns RC 10 (error path)
CMD: WORK:lua -l nosuchmodule
EXPECT_RC: 10
